title: Earthy Fluffy Korean Rice Bowl
description: A nourishing, post-workout Korean dish featuring mixed vegetables and low-sodium ingredients, perfect for a healthy meal. This earthy, fluffy rice bowl is made with brown rice, mixed peel, and various vegetables.
instructions: Rinse the brown rice in a fine-mesh strainer and cook according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced zucchini and grated carrots, cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the chopped green onions, mixed peel, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Combine the cooked brown rice with the vegetable mixture and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the earthy fluffy Korean rice bowl hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
